patterns_applied.name: Terminology Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Different field labels per coverage section (e.g., Reserve vs Outstanding)

patterns_applied.name: Special Characters
patterns_applied.description: Injected Unicode special chars in 27 claim descriptions

patterns_applied.name: Currency Format Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Different currency formats per section ($1,234 vs 1234.56 vs em-dash for zero)

patterns_applied.name: Date Format Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Different date formats per section (MM/DD/YYYY vs YYYY-MM-DD vs Mon DD, YYYY)

patterns_applied.name: Truncated Fields
patterns_applied.description: Truncated 7 description fields with ellipsis

patterns_applied.name: Name Variant
patterns_applied.description: Name variant: 'Great Lakes Freight Systems, Inc.' → 'Great Lakes Freight Systems, Incorporated' for sov

patterns_applied.name: Address Mismatch
patterns_applied.description: Address variant: '1200 Nationwide Boulevard' → '1200 Nationwide Blvd.'

patterns_applied.name: Date Format Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Date format set to mmm dd, yyyy for sov

patterns_applied.name: Borderless Table
patterns_applied.description: Removed all table gridlines, whitespace-only alignment

patterns_applied.name: Merged Headers
patterns_applied.description: 3-row merged header with SPAN commands for column groups

patterns_applied.name: Subtotal Rows
patterns_applied.description: Location-grouped claims with interspersed subtotal rows

patterns_applied.name: Nested Tables
patterns_applied.description: Payment detail sub-tables nested inside outer claim table cells

patterns_applied.name: Multi-Line Wrap
patterns_applied.description: Long narrative descriptions wrapping 3-5 lines without row separators

patterns_applied.name: Rotated Headers
patterns_applied.description: Financial column headers drawn as 90-degree rotated text via canvas rotation

patterns_applied.name: Variable Column Widths
patterns_applied.description: Header row column widths shifted 2-5pt from data row widths

patterns_applied.name: Alternating Shading
patterns_applied.description: Alternating row background colors for readability

patterns_applied.name: Floating Headers
patterns_applied.description: Metadata block above table pushes column headers to row 8-15

patterns_applied.name: Interrupted Tables
patterns_applied.description: Table interrupted by disclaimer block(s), repeat_headers=True

patterns_applied.name: Ambiguous Headers
patterns_applied.description: Multi-line stacked header text with varying depth per column

patterns_applied.name: Watermark Overlay
patterns_applied.description: Diagonal semi-transparent 'DRAFT' watermark across all pages

patterns_applied.name: Embedded Images
patterns_applied.description: Status icons (check/x/warning) replace text status in GL table cells

patterns_applied.name: Invisible OCR Text
patterns_applied.description: Render mode 3 (invisible) text at slightly offset positions

patterns_applied.name: Untagged Headers/Footers
patterns_applied.description: Header/footer text drawn directly on canvas without structure tags

patterns_applied.name: Fragmented Borders
patterns_applied.description: Table grid as many small overlapping line segments (Word export simulation)

patterns_applied.name: Bezier Borders
patterns_applied.description: Table grid using cubic Bezier curves with collinear control points

patterns_applied.name: Clipping Paths
patterns_applied.description: Text extends beyond clipping rectangle — full text extractable but partially visible

patterns_applied.name: Broken CMap
patterns_applied.description: Fully scrambled ToUnicode CMap on Courier fonts

patterns_applied.name: OCG Hidden Layers
patterns_applied.description: Hidden OCG layer with extractable but invisible text

patterns_applied.name: Font Subset Corruption
patterns_applied.description: CMap missing mappings for digits 0, 5, 7

patterns_applied.name: Handwritten Elements
patterns_applied.description: Handwritten signature, date stamp, and margin annotations

patterns_applied.name: Skewed Scan
patterns_applied.description: Skewed scan with 1.8° rotation and dark edge shadows (1 pages)

patterns_applied.name: Heavy Degradation
patterns_applied.description: Heavy OCR degradation on 1/1 pages: rotation, blur, noise, scan lines, JPEG q25
